headline: CCJ oversold. CCJ and NXT cooling below MA50. Entry window open.
marketContext: Cycle is in Expansion / risk-on (confidence 87%) — posture is watch_only. Fundamentals are running ahead of price in Gold & Silver — Correction Within a Structural Bull and AI Infrastructure Hardware — Rate Compression, Not Demand Break — the market's fear is the opportunity. Fed Hike Repricing — The Q3 Macro Axis, NAVN — Profitability Inflection, Parabolic Price is priced ahead of fundamentals — don't chase.
groupAContext: BWXT (RSI 42.1, -22.7% from peak), CLS (RSI 47.1, -25.2% from peak) are cooling — early-entry thesis intact. KNSL is extended (RSI 58.5) — no new entry here, let momentum resolve. Best setup: BWXT at RSI 42.1 — -22.7% from 52-week high with narrative not yet priced by institutions.
groupBContext: CCJ (RSI 37.6) is technically oversold — historically a high-quality entry signal for moat names. NXT (RSI 44.4, -10% vs MA50), GOOGL (RSI 48.2, -4% vs MA50), NVDA (RSI 49.7, -3% vs MA50) are below MA50 with cooling RSI — approaching entry range. Highest conviction: NVDA (score 75) — use RSI and MA50 levels to time entry, not to validate the thesis.

frameworkPanel.thesis: Plateau rates ~3-3.5%, no zero-rate rescue, adjustment risk elevated (Jun)
frameworkPanel.verdict: PARTIALLY SUPPORTED — treat as a ~30-40% scenario, not a base case.
frameworkPanel.sizing: Run ~60-70% offense / 30-40% defense+hedge rather than either extreme.
frameworkPanel.activation: Activation trigger: Baa-10Y credit spread widening past ~2.5 while Fed holds (now 1.56)
frameworkPanel.calibration_finding: Measured across 377 names (6m forward): deep dislocation (>35% below high) won only 35.7% of the time; names within 10% of highs won 58% (median 5.6%). Dislocation depth has been NEGATIVE alpha in this regime — buy stabilization, not depth.
